subject: Re: Vectrix Q4 update — Threshold Ventures

messages.subject: Vectrix Q4 update — please send board materials before Jan 10
messages.body:
Hi Priya,

Happy holidays. Looking forward to your Q4 update. Can you send the board deck and metrics package before January 10? David Kim and Sarah Lindgren will also be reviewing.

For the package, we'd like to see:
- MRR and customer count (monthly, Sep–Dec)
- Cash runway update
- Key wins and misses
- Q1 priorities and targets
- Cap table update if anything has changed since your seed close

Also — I heard you're close to landing a healthcare enterprise customer. I'd love a brief note on that deal separately if you're comfortable sharing.

— Amira Patel
Partner, Threshold Ventures

messages.subject: Re: Vectrix Q4 update — board materials
messages.body:
Amira,

Happy holidays. Yes — materials coming before Jan 10.

Quick preview since you asked:
- MRR at Dec close: $8,200 (up from $1,200 in September — 6.8x in 4 months)
- 7 paying customers, 0 churn
- Biggest Q4 win: Cascade Systems signed Enterprise at $2,400/mo (closed Jan 8 — technically Q1 but it was a Q4 pipeline result)
- The healthcare enterprise deal is Meridian Health Systems — VP Engineering found us on HN. $2,800/mo, 12-month contract. Currently in legal review with our counsel (Orion Legal). Target close: mid-March.

I'll have the full deck and metrics package to you by January 8.

— Priya

messages.subject: Re: Vectrix Q4 update — materials attached
messages.body:
Amira,

Q4 board package attached. Highlights on page 3.

A few things I'll call out that aren't in the deck:

1. We had our first P1 incident on Dec 23 — a rate limiter bug took the dashboard down for ~90 minutes. Jordan was solo on-call during the holiday. We've since formalized an on-call rotation and fixed the alert isolation issue. Full post-mortem is attached.
2. We closed a seed extension of $400K in December from David Kim (angel) to extend runway to approximately 18 months.
3. Meridian is real — I was on a call with their VP of Engineering and VP of IT Security this week. They're serious buyers and the requirements (SSO, US data residency, 12-month retention, SOC 2 Type II) are all addressable.

Happy to jump on a call this week if useful.

— Priya

messages.subject: Re: Vectrix Q4 update — materials attached
messages.body:
Priya,

This is excellent. 6.8x MRR growth in four months is the kind of number we love to see.

A few questions after reviewing the deck:
1. Meridian: what's the most likely reason this deal doesn't close? I want to understand the risk.
2. Dashboard v2: is the March launch date firm? Any customer commitments that depend on it?
3. Runway at 18 months assumes no new hires. What's the hiring plan?

Let's do a call January 15 at 2pm PT. I'll have David Kim and Sarah Lindgren dial in.

— Amira
